>Synopsis:	Re: ports/141364: Update port: net-mgmt/zabbix to 1.8
>Severity:	non-critical

>Category:	ports 
>Class:		maintainer-update
>Release:	FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE-p2 amd64
>Environment:
System: FreeBSD zion.christianserving.org 6.3-RELEASE-p2 FreeBSD 6.3-RELEASE-p2 #3: Mon May  5 21:27:22 CDT
>Description:
This is a significant update to the zabbix and zabbix-agent ports
(pretty much a complete rewrite).  It uses master/slave ports and
splits zabbix into zabbix-server, zabbix-proxy, and zabbix-frontend.
It also updates to version 1.8 but creates new zabbix16-* ports to
support those who cannot yet upgrade from version 1.6.

The attached shar contains all of the updates for all of these ports.
It also includes updates in UPDATING and MOVED.
>How-To-Repeat:
>Fix:

echo x - MOVED
sed 's/^X//' >MOVED << 'END-of-MOVED'
Xnet-mgmt/zabbix|net-mgmt/zabbix-server|2009-12-11|port was split into three components
END-of-MOVED
echo x - UPDATING
sed 's/^X//' >UPDATING << 'END-of-UPDATING'
X20091211
X  AFFECTS: users of net-mgmt/zabbix, net-mgmt/zabbix-agent
X  AUTHOR: Jim Riggs <ports@christianserving.org>
X
X  In order to simplify configuration and better separate the different
X  components of Zabbix, the former zabbix port has been split into
X  three: zabbix-server, zabbix-proxy, and zabbix-frontend.  Each
X  component has distinct functionality and may be installed
X  independently on separate systems.  The existing zabbix-agent port
X  remains.
X
X  Additionally, the new zabbix-frontend port now (correctly) installs
X  the PHP frontend in PREFIX/www/zabbix.  The old zabbix port
X  installed the files in PREFIX/share/zabbix/php.  Web server
X  configurations must be updated accordingly.
X
X  Finally, Zabbix has been updated to version 1.8.  Not everyone may
X  be able to upgradee from version 1.6 immediately, though, so 1.6.8
X  versions of the ports are also available as zabbix16-server,
X  zabbix16-proxy, zabbix16-agent, and zabbix16-frontend.
END-of-UPDATING

X# New ports collection makefile for:	zabbix-server
X# Date created:		2009-12-09
X# Whom:			Jim Riggs <ports@christianserving.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	zabbix
XPORTVERSION=	1.8
XPORTEPOCH=	2
XCATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
XMASTER_SITES=	SF/zabbix/ZABBIX%20Latest%20Stable/${PORTVERSION}
XPKGNAMESUFFIX?=	-server
X
XMAINTAINER=	ports@christianserving.org
XCOMMENT=	Enterprise-class open source distributed monitoring (${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S/^-//})
X
XCONFLICTS=	${PKGBASE}-1.[0-6]*
X
X.if ${PKGNAMESUFFIX} != "-agent"
XCONFLICTS+=	${PORTNAME}-1.[0-6]*
X.endif
X
XZABBIX_BUILD=	${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S/^-//}
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "frontend" # frontend only needs the version/distribution settings
XLIB_DEPENDS=	netsnmp:${PORTSDIR}/net-mgmt/net-snmp \
X		curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
X
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
XMAN8=		${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.8
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}
X.else
XMAN1=		${PORTNAME}_get.1 ${PORTNAME}_sender.1
XMAN8=		${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d.8
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d
X.endif
X
XUSERS=		zabbix
XGROUPS=		zabbix
X
XPLIST_SUB=	ZABBIX_BUILD=${ZABBIX_BUILD}
XSUB_LIST=	ZABBIX_BUILD=${ZABBIX_BUILD}
X
XMAKE_ARGS+=	ARCH=freebsd
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-${ZABBIX_BUILD} --with-net-snmp
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
XOPTIONSFILE=	${PORT_DBDIR}/${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}/options
XOPTIONS=	MYSQL "Use MySQL backend" on \
X		PGSQL "Use PostgreSQL backend" off \
X		SQLITE "Use SQLite backend" off \
X		IPV6 "Support for IPv6" on \
X		LDAP "Support for checking LDAP servers" on \
X		JABBER "Use jabber media type" on \
X		FPING "Use fping for pinging hosts" on
X
X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_MYSQL
XUSE_MYSQL=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-mysql
X.elifdef WITH_PGSQL
XUSE_PGSQL=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-pgsql
X.elifdef WITH_SQLITE
XUSE_SQLITE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-sqlite3
X.else
XIGNORE=		zabbix requires a database backend
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_LDAP
XUSE_OPENLDAP=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-ldap
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_JABBER
XLIB_DEPENDS+=	iksemel:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/iksemel
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-jabber
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_FPING
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	fping:${PORTSDIR}/net/fping
X.endif
X.endif # if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X
X.ifdef WITH_IPV6
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-ipv6
X.endif
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${GREP} -rl "/etc/zabbix" ${WRKSRC} \
X	  | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's#/etc/zabbix#${ETCDIR}#g' \
X	  && ${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -type f -name '*.bak' -exec ${RM} -f {} +
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X.ifdef WITHOUT_FPING
X	@${ECHO} 'DisablePinger=yes' >> ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf
X.endif
X.endif
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${INSTALL} -d ${ETCDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf ${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf.sample
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} == "agent"
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d.conf ${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d.conf.sample
X.endif
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}/upgrades/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} dbpatches ${DATADIR}/${ZABBIX_BUILD}/upgrades/
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}/create/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "data schema" ${DATADIR}/${ZABBIX_BUILD}/create/
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X.endif
X.endif # if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "frontend"
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-net-mgmt/zabbix-server/Makefile

X# New ports collection makefile for:	zabbix16-server
X# Date created:		2009-12-10
X# Whom:			Jim Riggs <ports@christianserving.org>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	zabbix
XPORTVERSION=	1.6.8
XPORTEPOCH=	2
XCATEGORIES=	net-mgmt
XMASTER_SITES=	SF/zabbix/ZABBIX%20Latest%20Stable/${PORTVERSION}
XPKGNAMESUFFIX?=	-server
X
XMAINTAINER=	ports@christianserving.org
XCOMMENT=	Enterprise-class open source distributed monitoring (${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S/^-//})
X
XCONFLICTS=	${PKGBASE}-1.8*
X
X.if ${PKGNAMESUFFIX} != "-agent"
XCONFLICTS+=	${PORTNAME}-1.[0-6]*
X.endif
X
XZABBIX_BUILD=	${PKGNAMESUFFIX:S/^-//}
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "frontend" # frontend only needs the version/distribution settings
XLIB_DEPENDS=	netsnmp:${PORTSDIR}/net-mgmt/net-snmp \
X		curl:${PORTSDIR}/ftp/curl
X
XSUB_FILES=	pkg-message
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}
X.else
XUSE_RC_SUBR=	${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d
X.endif
X
XUSERS=		zabbix
XGROUPS=		zabbix
X
XPLIST_SUB=	ZABBIX_BUILD=${ZABBIX_BUILD}
XSUB_LIST=	ZABBIX_BUILD=${ZABBIX_BUILD}
X
XMAKE_ARGS+=	ARCH=freebsd
XGNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-${ZABBIX_BUILD} --with-net-snmp
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
XOPTIONSFILE=	${PORT_DBDIR}/${PORTNAME}${PKGNAMESUFFIX}/options
XOPTIONS=	MYSQL "Use MySQL backend" on \
X		PGSQL "Use PostgreSQL backend" off \
X		SQLITE "Use SQLite backend" off \
X		IPV6 "Support for IPv6" on \
X		LDAP "Support for checking LDAP servers" on \
X		JABBER "Use jabber media type" on \
X		FPING "Use fping for pinging hosts" on
X
X.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_MYSQL
XUSE_MYSQL=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-mysql
X.elifdef WITH_PGSQL
XUSE_PGSQL=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-pgsql
X.elifdef WITH_SQLITE
XUSE_SQLITE=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-sqlite3
X.else
XIGNORE=		zabbix requires a database backend
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_LDAP
XUSE_OPENLDAP=	yes
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-ldap
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_JABBER
XLIB_DEPENDS+=	iksemel:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/iksemel
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--with-jabber
X.endif
X
X.ifndef WITHOUT_FPING
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	fping:${PORTSDIR}/net/fping
X.endif
X.endif # if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X
X.ifdef WITH_IPV6
XCONFIGURE_ARGS+=	--enable-ipv6
X.endif
X
Xpost-patch:
X	@${GREP} -rl "/etc/zabbix" ${WRKSRC} \
X	  | ${XARGS} ${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's#/etc/zabbix#${ETCDIR}#g' \
X	  && ${FIND} ${WRKSRC} -type f -name '*.bak' -exec ${RM} -f {} +
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X.ifdef WITHOUT_FPING
X	@${ECHO} 'DisablePinger=yes' >> ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf
X.endif
X.endif
X
Xpost-install:
X	@${INSTALL} -d ${ETCDIR}
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf ${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}.conf.sample
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} == "agent"
X	@${INSTALL_DATA} ${WRKSRC}/misc/conf/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d.conf ${ETCDIR}/${PORTNAME}_${ZABBIX_BUILD}d.conf.sample
X.endif
X
X.if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "agent"
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}/upgrades/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} dbpatches ${DATADIR}/${ZABBIX_BUILD}/upgrades/
X	@cd ${WRKSRC}/create/ && ${COPYTREE_SHARE} "data schema" ${DATADIR}/${ZABBIX_BUILD}/create/
X	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}
X.endif
X.endif # if ${ZABBIX_BUILD} != "frontend"
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>

XZabbix is software that monitors numerous parameters of a network and
Xthe health and integrity of servers. Zabbix uses a flexible
Xnotification mechanism that allows users to configure e-mail based
Xalerts for virtually any event. This allows a fast reaction to server
Xproblems. Zabbix offers excellent reporting and data visualisation
Xfeatures based on the stored data. This makes Zabbix ideal for
Xcapacity planning.
